questionHtml:
State

where the DNA of each individual could be taken from.

how the DNA is amplified.
markschemeHtml:
from blood sample/hair/cheek/saliva/semen;

Do not accept red blood cells

PCR/polymerase chain reaction
OR
using Taq polymerase;
